assertionResults.observation: Public issue #28 records PR #38 final head cf4ce450882f110c92d60e01f8580dc851111eb3 and all-green run 29162394115 covering persisted intents, reload, replacement, confirmation, reorg, timeout, and unknown submission in deterministic wallet fixtures. The recorded checks directly support this assertion: The immutable reviewed swap intent is persisted before broadcast and enters unknown-submission reconciliation when no hash returns.

Public issue #28 records PR #38 final head cf4ce450882f110c92d60e01f8580dc851111eb3 and all-green run 29162394115 covering persisted intents, reload, replacement, confirmation, reorg, timeout, and unknown submission in deterministic wallet fixtures. The recorded checks directly support this assertion: Retry is blocked while nonce and pending or canonical transaction checks cannot exclude an earlier broadcast.

Public issue #28 records PR #38 final head cf4ce450882f110c92d60e01f8580dc851111eb3 and all-green run 29162394115 covering persisted intents, reload, replacement, confirmation, reorg, timeout, and unknown submission in deterministic wallet fixtures. The recorded checks directly support this assertion: A discovered transaction is attached to the existing intent using owner, chain, deployment, nonce, and intent fingerprint.

Public issue #28 records PR #38 final head cf4ce450882f110c92d60e01f8580dc851111eb3 and all-green run 29162394115 covering persisted intents, reload, replacement, confirmation, reorg, timeout, and unknown submission in deterministic wallet fixtures. The recorded checks directly support this assertion: A retry becomes available only after reconciliation proves no matching transaction was broadcast, and it uses a fresh quote and review.

environment.operatingSystem: GitHub-hosted Linux and independently recorded exact-head validation
environment.stack: Feather SDK, web, RPC, indexer, and transaction fixture suites
